market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: 3-Bedroom Flat 2 Min Walk to Oxford Road Station
Spacious Flat with Oxford Road Station Nearby
Charming 3-Bed Flat Close to Manchester City Centre
analysis.rewritten_desc: This 3-bedroom entire flat sleeps 4 guests and offers a peaceful retreat just 2 minutes from Oxford Road Station (Manchester). Located 15 minutes from city centre attractions, it's ideal for travelers needing station-adjacent accommodation. With a 4.64 rating across 368 reviews, guests praise our property's consistent availability - currently offering 18 open nights in the next 90 days. While the rate is set at £232/night (50% above Manchester's median rate of £154), our occupancy remains strong at 80.4% booked. Note: Please check directly for the most current availability and amenities updates.
analysis.photo_order_rec: The living room serves as the ideal cover photo to showcase the property's inviting common space while establishing the station proximity mentioned in the title.
key_diagnosis: Title lacks strongest differentiator - 3-bedrooms (current rate £232 vs median £154)
Missing all 3 high-value amenity categories despite above-market pricing
Description contains no narrative despite 368 reviews and 4.64 rating
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £232 rate exceeds Manchester's median by 50% while maintaining 80.4% occupancy, but missing 3 key amenity categories may prevent maximizing this strong performance
